title_en: Amendment to the Telecommunications Business Act
summary_en: Proposes adjusting the 49% foreign-ownership cap for telecom carriers and easing entry for satellite and value-added services.
source_ko: 기간통신사업자에 대한 외국인 지분 제한(49%)을 조정하는 내용

summary_en: Foreign ownership of facilities-based telecom carriers is capped at 49% (direct and indirect aggregate).
Foreign ownership of cable and satellite broadcasters is capped at 49%; terrestrial broadcasting is excluded.
Foreign ownership of domestic and air passenger/cargo carriers must remain under 50%.
source_ko: 내항 및 항공의 여객·화물 운송업 50% 미만

title_en: Act on the Promotion of Newspapers — foreign-ownership cap
title_ko: 신문 등의 진흥에 관한 법률 (외국인 지분 제한)
summary_en: Foreign ownership of news agencies is capped under 25%; newspaper publishers under 50%.

title_en: Electric Utility Act — generation capacity cap
summary_en: Foreign investors may hold under 30% of national power-generation capacity; transmission/distribution remain restricted.

title_en: Foreign Investment Promotion Act — defense exclusion
summary_en: Defense-industry businesses are listed as restricted/excluded sectors; foreign investment requires case-by-case approval or is barred.
source_ko: 방위산업체 — 제한·제외 업종 (개별 심사 또는 불허)

title_en: Game Industry Promotion Act — loot-box disclosure
summary_en: Mandatory disclosure of probabilities for random ('loot-box') game items; applies to domestic and overseas operators serving Korea.
source_ko: 확률형 아이템의 종류·확률 정보 공개 의무화

title_en: Amendment to the Electronic Financial Transactions Act
summary_en: Tightens registration and safeguarding requirements for electronic payment and e-money providers, affecting fintech market entry.
source_ko: 전자지급수단·전자화폐 발행업자에 대한 등록·이용자 자금 보호 강화

title_ko: 국가첨단전략산업 경쟁력 강화 및 보호에 관한 특별조치법
summary_en: Designates semiconductors as a national strategic industry; adds technology-protection and export-screening duties for investors.
source_ko: 반도체 등 국가첨단전략기술 지정 — 기술보호·수출 심사 의무
